channel.title: Risotto on cacing69
channel.description: Recent content in Risotto on cacing69

item.title: Hello World - First Post
item.description:
Hello world dari Hugo + Risotto 🚀

This is my first post on this blog. I’m excited to share my thoughts, experiences, and knowledge with you all.

What is this blog about?

This blog is where I’ll be writing about:

  • Software development
  • Web technologies
  • Open source projects
  • And everything in between

Stay tuned for more content!
